arts.ttl: Liverpool's atmosphere summed up as Bologna boss makes telling Anfield comment
arts.sum: Bologna boss Vincenzo Italiano commented on the Anfield atmosphere after seeing his side slip to a 2-0 Champions League defeat in the maiden meeting between the two clubs

arts.ttl: Arne Slot insists Premier League leaders Liverpool won't rest on their laurels after an impressive start to their campaign - as Reds prepare for a thorny run of fixtures after the international break
arts.sum: Liverpool travel to Crystal Palace on Saturday knowing a win will keep them at the summit - but Slot's men are yet to face anyone in the top nine of the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool eye 'exciting' £32m star Jurgen Klopp hailed in 2022, face Arsenal battle
Arne Slot highlights Ryan Gravenberch improvement - and how Liverpool must help Darwin Nunez
arts.sum: The Reds are top of the table but the new manager is looking for further improvements

arts.ttl: Preston North End forward Milutin Osmajic learns punishment for biting Blackburn Rovers defender Owen Beck
arts.sum: The Football Association announces how many games Preston North End forward Milutin Osmajic will miss for biting Blackburn Rovers defender Owen Beck.

arts.ttl: Mo Salah regen: Liverpool invited to flex their muscles as top-scorer would rather join Reds than West Ham
arts.sum: There’s a new Pharoah in town and Liverpool could be the club to secure his signature, if they so wish. Frankfurt’s Omar Marmoush has been heavily linked with a move to the Premier League, though it’s understood that he won’t be for sale until the next summer transfer window. arts.ttl: Preston’s Milutin Osmajic given eight-match ban for biting Blackburn’s Owen Beck
arts.sum: The incident took place at Deepdale on September 22.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot explains Darwin Nunez and Liverpool problem as Federico Chiesa injury update given
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot has been talking ahead of the Premier League clash at Crystal Palace on Saturday

arts.ttl: European court rules FIFA transfer rules breach EU law as Everton and Liverpool learn verdict

arts.ttl: Former Liverpool captain returns to AXA Training Centre after controversial transfer
arts.sum: Jordan Henderson has been spotted at the AXA Training Centre this week following his Liverpool departure in the summer of 2023
